title: Zep Silicone Sealant Remover & Silicone Remover Tool
features: Zep's Silicone Remover, when paired with the Silicone Remover Set, forms an unbeatable duo for effortless silicone removal. Whether you're tackling a DIY project or a professional job.
Zep Silicone Sealant Remover comes in a 100ml bottle for swift removal of silicone sealant residue with an applicator brush for easy application of the solution.
5 in 1 Silicone remover set can be used for the removal of old silicone and smoothing fresh silicone with the 5 different angle corners letting you to choose the tip that suits your work.
Our silicone remover tool is made of high-density wear-resistant ABS plastic. The tool is durable, and long lasting. The stainless steel head is very helpful in removing old caulk.
Easy to Use: With the Remover Tool scrape as much silicone as possible before applying the Sealant Remover Solvent. Wait 15 minutes and scrape any remaing residue. Apply again if required.
description: Product Description Zep Silicone Remover Kit: The Ultimate Solution for Silicone Removal and Application Professional-Grade Silicone Remover Solution Our 100ml bottle of Zep Silicone Sealant Remover comes equipped with an applicator brush for easy and precise application. This powerful formula swiftly dissolves stubborn silicone residue, making your removal tasks effortless and efficient. Versatile Silicone Remover Tool Our innovative Silicone Remover Set is your go-to tool for both removing old silicone and smoothing fresh applications. With five different angled corners, you can choose the perfect tip for any job, ensuring professional results every time. Durable and Long-Lasting Design Crafted from high-density, wear-resistant ABS plastic, our silicone remover tool is built to last. The stainless steel head efficiently tackles old caulk, making it an indispensable addition to your toolkit for both DIY enthusiasts and professionals alike.
